description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof design with clean, geometric lines and a predominantly white exterior. Large floor-to-ceiling windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor transitions, especially toward the pool and patio area. The structure is arranged in an L-shape, with a central open courtyard and multiple green spaces, including a rooftop terrace and landscaped garden beds. The front includes a driveway leading to a garage, while the rear opens to a wooden deck and a rectangular swimming pool surrounded by lounge chairs and palm trees. The interior layout is visible through the transparent windows, revealing open-plan living spaces and contemporary furnishings. The overall aesthetic is minimalist, with a focus on open space, natural materials, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large glass windows, an L-shaped layout, a central courtyard, and a poolside deck surrounded by greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, and a glimpse of the open courtyard and interior spaces.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid white exterior walls, rooftop terrace, and minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring the pool, wooden deck, palm trees, and extensive glass walls opening to the outdoor area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a focus on the flat roof sections, side garden, and secondary entrances.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large floor-to-ceiling windows and grouped glass doors
